relations.subject: Comoro olive pigeon
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and it can be found in Comoros (especially Mount Karthala) and Mayotte, with a higher-density population being observed in the latter
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
